# Development Sub-Agent Index

The canonical Interface is `.codex/agent_registry_v1.json`. Role names are
capability presets over four execution modes; they are not independently
maintained personas. Native Codex TOML adapters under `.codex/agents/*.toml`
and matching Claude agents under `.claude/agents/*.md` are executable identities;
adjacent Codex Markdown and role profiles are generated human views. All are
Registry projections and must pass
`python3 helper_scripts/maintenance_scripts/agent_governance.py render --check`.

## Loading route

1. Bind a role, ownership, task shape, expected output, and risk facts.
2. Compile an adaptive context plan; mandatory user scope, acceptance, hard
   boundaries, current diff/interfaces, and fresh blockers are never truncated.
3. Read role skills and task evidence on demand. Do not universal-preload all
   role memories, reports, README, TODO, and full operating memory.
4. Return an immutable role fragment. PM produces at most one durable
   `closure_packet_v1` projection for the task.

Runtime type is an execution substrate, never a model-intelligence tier.
